title: Spicy Creamy Show-off Syrian Chickpea Stir-fry
description: This dish combines spicy chickpeas with a creamy chimichurri sauce and bhuna spices for an impressive meal that's both flavorful and easy to prepare.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste
ingredients.notes: To season the chickpeas and sauce

instructions: Rinse the canned chickpeas and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine Greek yogurt, tomato paste, lemon juice, minced garlic, red pepper flakes, salt, black pepper, and olive oil. Blend until smooth.
Heat the chickpeas in a large pan with a bit of oil over medium heat until they start to brown lightly.
Add the chimichurri sauce to the chickpeas and stir continuously for 1-2 minutes or until evenly coated.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
